reviews.comment:
Buen precio, nunca esperas mucho, y hay alguno de los pibes que son buena onda, y hay otros que no se le cae ni un gracias. Pero bueno suma por precio, y comodidad.

(Translated by Google)
Good price, you never expect too much, and some of the guys are really cool, while others are so unhelpful they wouldn't even say thank you. But hey, it's a plus for the price and convenience.

reviews.comment:
La atencion de los playeros es amable pero el servicio es muy lento, casi siempre que voy a cargar hay filas de espera y pocos playeros despachando

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants are friendly, but the service is very slow. Almost every time I go to refuel, there are long lines and few attendants working.
